tweets.text: The tankers are smart, they are using the funeral to go back in through the Oman route. https://t.co/82RCvD3GSC
tweets.full_text: The tankers are smart, they are using the funeral to go back in through the Oman route. https://t.co/82RCvD3GSC

tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Just a quick cheat guide: any tanker ending with "prosperity" or "b" will be used for ship-to-ship transfers via the Oman lane under US escorts.

VLCC inbound tanker flow, excluding Iran, is around 4 a day right now, or 8 million b/d.

Most of the inbound tankers using the Iran route are limited to Iranian flows and products. 

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic and the last two days for reference.
tweets.full_text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Just a quick cheat guide: any tanker ending with "prosperity" or "b" will be used for ship-to-ship transfers via the Oman lane under US escorts.

VLCC inbound tanker flow, excluding Iran, is around 4 a day right now, or 8 million b/d.

Most of the inbound tankers using the Iran route are limited to Iranian flows and products. 

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic and the last two days for reference.
